roseText: Just like this magical rose, may your smile bloom forever... 🌹✨

qualities.title: Kind Soul
qualities.desc: Always the first to care, never the last to show it.

qualities.title: Radiant
qualities.desc: You light up every single room you walk into.

qualities.title: Infectious Laugh
qualities.desc: One laugh from you and the whole world smiles.

qualities.title: Loyal Friend
qualities.desc: When everyone leaves, you stay. That says everything.

qualities.title: Unstoppable
qualities.desc: Challenges don't stop you, they only make you stronger.

qualities.title: One of a Kind
qualities.desc: There is truly nobody else quite like you in this world.

backContent.title: To My Bestie Saumya,
backContent.text: A special chapter in the beautiful book of your life...

backContent.title: Always Stay Awesome
backContent.text: The world is incomplete without a friend like you!

memories.title: Amazing Friend...
memories.desc: I was thinking about our funny moments today and couldn't help but laugh. Your presence always lightens the mood.

memories.title: Best Therapist ✨
memories.desc: Whenever I talk to you and we start our random gossips, all my worries just disappear. ✨

memories.title: Growing Together
memories.desc: Like our awesome bond, you just keep getting wiser and more fun with every passing day. 😍

memories.title: Endless Drama
memories.desc: I am always ready for our endless gossips, random discussions, and daily drama! 🌟

memories.title: Crazy Times
memories.desc: Every time I look at our crazy pictures together, I just can't stop smiling at our stupidity.

memories.title: Your Positivity..
memories.desc: Your positive energy and bright smile always bring good vibes.

memories.title: Kind Soul..
memories.desc: You have a genuinely kind heart and always support your friends.

memories.title: Fun Moments..
memories.desc: Every single moment spent with our group becomes a hilarious memory.

memories.title: Endless Laughter..
memories.desc: Having a best friend like you around brings endless joy and laughter.

memories.title: Forever Besties..
memories.desc: Always stay this crazy and keep shining bright.

carousel.title: I want to tell you Something 😎

timeline.label: The Beginning ✨
timeline.title: First Hello
timeline.desc: The moment we met and clicked instantly — I knew this friendship was meant to be.

timeline.label: Random Laughs 😂
timeline.title: Crazy Times
timeline.desc: All our unplanned adventures, random gossips, and inside jokes that no one else gets.

timeline.label: Growing Together 🌱
timeline.title: Side by Side
timeline.desc: Through every up and down, you were always right there — cheering me on without fail.

timeline.label: Drama & More 🎭

timeline.desc: Our lives basically became a series of plots nobody would believe without proof.

timeline.label: Real Support 🤝

timeline.label: Golden Memories 💛
timeline.title: Unforgettable

wishJar.wish: May all your dreams take flight and soar higher than the stars! 🌙
Wishing you a year full of beautiful surprises and pure happiness! 🌟
May your smile never fade and your heart always stay light! 😊
Success, love, and joy — may all three find you in abundance! 💛
May this birthday mark the beginning of your most magical chapter yet! ✨
You deserve every good thing the universe has to offer, Saumya! 🌸
Stay exactly as wonderful as you are — the world needs your spark! 💫
Here's to new adventures, new memories, and endless reasons to smile! 🎉

lines: I sit here trying to find the perfect words, and honestly — there aren't any that feel big enough.
You came into my life and just made everything brighter, louder, funnier, and so much more meaningful.
Through every random 2 AM conversation, every exam panic, every silly fight and every burst of laughter —
you have been the kind of friend people write songs about.
On this special day, I want you to know: you are seen, you are valued, and you are loved more than you'll ever realise.
Keep shining, keep being your wonderfully chaotic self, and never stop smiling that smile that makes the whole room warm.
The world is genuinely a better place because you are in it. 🌸

carouselCards.title: I want to tell you Something 😎

magicalGallery.backNote: This hilarious moment will always be cherished! 😂
Wishing you always reach for the sky and achieve your goals!
Your positive energy is unmatched. Nazar na lage! 🧿
Your cheerful nature brightens everyone's day around you.
Some hilarious moments that we will never forget.
Always be safe and keep progressing in life.
May our friendly banters and gossips never end.
May you get all the success you deserve.
School/College days are always the most precious.
A picture perfect moment with the gang!
A true friend for life! Always got your back.
